title: Croatian Chicken Casserole
description: A Chinese-inspired casserole dish that combines the flavors of Croatia with savory and creamy elements. This hearty casserole is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook Croatian Sausage in a pan until browned, breaking into small pieces.
Add Soy Sauce to the pan and stir to coat the sausage.
In a separate pan, heat the Casseroles Mix according to the package instructions.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked sausage mixture, beans, and mashed potatoes.
Pour the Casseroles Mix over the top of the sausage mixture.
Transfer the casserole to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the casserole is hot and the top is golden brown.
